title: Scotch Universal Gel Tape, 30mm x 3m - Double-Sided for Multi-purpose & Heavy Duty Applications, Removable Nano Mounting Tape, Clear, Water-Resistant, Holds up to 9 kg
features: VERSATILE SCOTCH MOUNTING TAPE: Ideal for hard surfaces including metal, tempered glass, tile, smooth stone, brick, vinyl siding, and acrylic, like nano tape
STRONG HOLDING POWER: This double sided tape is heavy duty, securely holding up to 9 kg, making it suitable for light and heavy mounting applications
REMOVABLE MOUNTING SOLUTION: This removable mounting tape eliminates the need for nails or screws
WATER-RESISTANT MULTI-SURFACE TAPE: The water-resistant design ensures a strong bond even in wet or humid environments
PERFECT FOR DIY PROJECTS: Use this clear mounting tape for DIY projects, hanging frames, posters, and lightweight decorations
PACKAGE INCLUDES ONE ROLL: Each pack contains one roll of Scotch heavy duty double sided mounting tape
